Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: The Studium app is an essential companion app for all Studium Members.
Changelog:
Studium overlay controls:
- The overlay Open button now opens the main Studium window and the in-game Free Company window when opening.
- Closing from the overlay still closes only the main Studium window.
Punchline: An essential companion app for all Studium members.
